basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI Ranikhet) has released the official Consultant Notification 2026 under Advt No. 01/2026-27 at the official website of CCRAS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the RARI Ranikhet Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 64 years of age with B.A.M.S. from any recognised University along with five years working experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 05-06-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A.M.S. from any recognised University with five years working experience
qualification.details: Consultant (Ayurveda): B.A.M.S. from any recognised University with five years working experience. Desirable: Experience extending Clinical care services, Publications.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RARI Ranikhet recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the RARI Ranikhet recruitment is Consultant (Ayurveda).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is B.A.M.S. from any recognised University with five years of working experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 64 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Ayurveda) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the RARI Ranikhet located?
faq.answer: RARI Ranikhet is located in Ranikhet, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263645.
